title: Variation of quasiconformal mappings on lines
summary:
We obtain improved regularity of homeomorphic solutions of the reduced
Beltrami equation, as compared to the standard Beltrami equation. Such an
improvement is not possible in terms of Holder or Sobolev regularity; instead,
our results concern the generalized variation of restrictions to lines.
Specifically, we prove that the restriction to any line segment has finite
p-variation for all p>1 but not necessarily for p=1.

title: On a Whitham-Type Equation
summary:
The Hunter-Saxton equation and the Gurevich-Zybin system are considered as
two mutually non-equivalent representations of one and the same Whitham-type
equation, and all their common solutions are obtained exactly.
